title: BTA Portable Jukebox
description: Adds portable music disc playback to the Better Than Adventure mod
body:
*This mod is for the Better than Adventure mod for beta 1.7.3 and will not work on normal beta 1.7.3*
*This mod requires java 17 or above to play* ## Portable music playback for Better than Adventure! This mod adds the Walkperson®, an item that can store and play back music discs while moving. ### Features: - Play, pause, and rewind any music disc - Store up to 10 discs at once - *Mostly* works in multiplayer (it doesn't sync if a player enters render distance while the music is playing) ### Credits: - `@Lazlo!!!` on the Better than Adventure discord server for the new texture - `@NovaStorm93` on github for fixing a crash when sorting the Walkpersons inventory ![A screenshot of the Walkperson gui, there is a play button and a greyed out rewind button since no music is currently playing](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/82da0a21ffe4e7dd04d853eadfc3835fd8d0f6cc_0.webp)
